author: @billyblankskank
text: 35:37 thanks for actually sharing the prompts and not trying to sell us an AI chat community. GOAT status

author: @mojavehigh
text: Anthropic has already updated their position that using the Agents SDK is also not allowed. Surprised with this incredible setup and team, that he is not aware.

author: @QuantumMentat
text: Just started using Claude Code: Remote Control, and I can do most, if not all, of these use cases from my iPhone to control my Mac.

author: @firerichrice
text: Didn't even need to copy paste, just had my openclaw pointed at your git and had it add each one. You rock dude thank you!

author: @Highseeker
text: You are one smart cookie, Matt. I'd love a private convo with you some time, I work in a highly niche industry that I believe is just waiting to be tapped with AI efficiencies. Your videos directly are helping me make good use of the opportunity. Thank you!
